reason: New app_icon command (returns base64 data URL) follows the IPC command conventions; getName/getVersion are core:app.
useAppName + useAppIcon are new hooks under the coverage gate; test them with mocked @tauri-apps/api app/core.
Hooks + the data URL must be typed; no any; graceful null on pending/fail.
Single-source the name/icon; remove the duplicate src/assets/logo.png.
